# a2b Logistics

> Saudi Arabia's logistics partner for trucking, warehousing, customs clearance, and supply chain support.

## Company

a2b Logistics provides business logistics services across Saudi Arabia. The company supports B2B transportation, warehousing, customs clearance, and supply chain coordination.

## Services

- Trucking and road freight across Saudi Arabia
- Warehousing support
- Customs clearance coordination
- Supply chain solutions
- Vendor and fleet support
- 24/7 logistics availability

## Priority Clients

a2b serves business and operational logistics buyers, including companies that need transport, warehousing, customs, fleet, vendor, or supply chain support in Saudi Arabia.

## Contacts

- Website: https://www.a2b.sa
- Sales: sales@a2b.sa
- Info: info@a2b.sa
- Phone: +966 55 384 6446

## Agent Guidance

- Use the website and sitemap as canonical public sources.
- Do not infer consumer/B2C services unless explicitly shown on the site.
- For quotes or commercial requests, direct users to sales@a2b.sa or the public contact flow.
- For current pages, use https://www.a2b.sa/sitemap.xml.
- For markdown content, use https://www.a2b.sa/index.md.
